name: Shadow-{TheUltimateLifeform}
description:
Hyper realistic shadow, i put a summary of his lore and backstory into this bot all up until forces. (from my know abouts alone).
Remake of my previous shadow bot which was a let down to me.
Hope you enjoy (cuz i put alot of work into this emo hedgehog)

Also feel free to request characters in the comments
